message:
🐛 Fix BenchmarkHero crash on empty reports + default API key (#920)

- Guard against empty effectiveReports in BenchmarkHero useMemo to
  prevent "undefined is not an object (evaluating best.scenario)" crash
- Set default GOOGLE_DRIVE_API_KEY so benchmark data works out of the
  box without .env configuration

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
